nodes.name: Solution Architect
nodes.description: Owns architecture metadata, API contracts, solution designs, decisions, and diagrams. Proposes and documents architectural changes to the NovaTrek platform.

nodes.name: Software Developer
nodes.description: Implements approved architecture designs in service source code, writes tests, and proposes API contract updates via pull request when implementation reveals contract gaps.

nodes.name: Guest
nodes.description: NovaTrek customer who books, checks in for, and participates in adventure trips.

nodes.name: Operations Staff
nodes.description: On-site NovaTrek employees who manage daily operations including check-in, scheduling, gear assignment, and incident response.

nodes.name: Adventure Guide
nodes.description: Certified outdoor guides who lead adventure trips, manage guest safety, and report incidents.

nodes.name: web-guest-portal
nodes.description: Public-facing web application for guests to browse trips, book reservations, manage profiles, sign waivers, and view trip media.

nodes.name: web-ops-dashboard
nodes.description: Internal web application for operations staff to manage check-ins, daily schedules, guide assignments, safety incidents, and partner bookings.

nodes.name: app-guest-mobile
nodes.description: Native mobile application for guests to self check-in, view live trip maps, receive weather alerts, upload photos, and earn loyalty points.

nodes.name: API Gateway
nodes.description: Central API Gateway that routes all external requests to backend microservices. Handles authentication, rate limiting, and TLS termination.

nodes.name: Event Bus
nodes.description: Apache Kafka cluster used for asynchronous event-driven communication between microservices. All domain events flow through dedicated Kafka topics.

nodes.name: Object Store
nodes.description: Cloud object storage for media assets including trip photos, guide profile images, and waiver documents.

nodes.name: Payment Gateway
nodes.description: PCI-certified payment processing gateway that handles credit card authorization, capture, and refund transactions.

nodes.name: Stripe API
nodes.description: Payment platform API for processing charges, managing payment methods, and handling disputes.

nodes.name: Fraud Detection API
nodes.description: Third-party fraud prevention service that scores payment transactions for risk before authorization.

nodes.name: DocuSign API
nodes.description: Electronic signature platform used for legally-binding adventure liability waivers and safety acknowledgments.

nodes.name: IDVerify API
nodes.description: Identity verification service used during check-in to validate guest identity against government-issued IDs.

nodes.name: Google Maps Platform
nodes.description: Geolocation and mapping service used for trail positioning, location tracking, and capacity management at adventure sites.

nodes.name: OpenWeather API
nodes.description: Weather data provider delivering current conditions, forecasts, and severe weather alerts for trail and adventure locations.

nodes.name: Firebase Cloud Messaging
nodes.description: Push notification delivery service for real-time alerts to guest mobile devices (weather warnings, check-in reminders, schedule changes).

nodes.name: SendGrid API
nodes.description: Transactional email delivery service for reservation confirmations, waiver requests, and loyalty point notifications.

nodes.name: Twilio API
nodes.description: SMS and messaging service for check-in reminders, schedule updates, and emergency notifications to guests and guides.

nodes.name: Snowflake Data Cloud
nodes.description: Cloud data warehouse used for business intelligence, analytics aggregation, and historical trend analysis across all NovaTrek domains.

nodes.name: National Parks Permit API
nodes.description: Government parks and forestry service API for submitting trail access permits, validating permit status, and receiving seasonal trail closure notifications.

nodes.name: Travel Insurance API
nodes.description: Third-party travel insurance provider for quoting and binding adventure trip insurance policies based on activity risk level and participant profile.

nodes.name: Search and Rescue Dispatch API
nodes.description: Regional search and rescue coordination API for dispatching emergency response teams to backcountry locations during safety incidents.

nodes.name: Instagram Graph API
nodes.description: Meta social media API enabling guests to share adventure trip photos and stories directly from the NovaTrek media gallery to their Instagram accounts.

nodes.name: Currency Exchange API
nodes.description: Real-time foreign currency exchange rate provider for converting international guest payments to the base operating currency.

nodes.name: Fleet GPS Tracking API
nodes.description: Vehicle telematics and GPS tracking platform providing real-time location, speed, and ETA data for NovaTrek transport fleet vehicles including shuttles, vans, and boats.

nodes.name: Supplier Procurement Portal
nodes.description: External supplier ordering platform for procuring adventure gear, safety equipment, and consumable supplies from approved NovaTrek vendors.
